subcodes.first_line: In this day it behooveth every one of the people of God, through the might and power of the All-Possessing, to pass beyond the gulf of names, that they may [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز بر هر یک از حزب الهی لازم که بقوت و قدرت صمدانی از خلیج اسما بگذرند تا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @literal interpretation
